negative_constraints.finding: Attempting to use basic induction on the critical strip consistently fails at the boundary.

positive_heuristics.finding: Transforming the zeta function into the Xi function simplifies the symmetry proofs significantly.

unexplored_frontiers.description: Topological methods applied to the critical strip
unexplored_frontiers.rationale: No lineage has attempted topological arguments yet.
Random matrix theory connections remain unexplored in formal verification.
